block_00: Notice of potential Dormant Account fee
block_01: Your trading account with IQ Option has not been active for
block_05: the absence of account activity for a period of 90 consecutive days may result in a Dormant Account service fee of 10 Euro.*
block_06: If your account remains inactive at the end of the 90 days, the following service fee will be deducted from your current IQ Option account balance:
block_14: We will NOT charge your credit card or any other payment medium you’ve used. The amount will be deducted from your IQ Option account balance.
block_15: The service fee shall NOT exceed 10 Euro per month (or the equivalent amount in another currency on the day of deduction of the fee.
block_16: If your account balance does not contain the available funds for the full service fee, a lower fee may be charged at the discretion of the Company so as to avoid a negative account balance.
block_17: If your account balance contains the available funds for the 10 Euro Dormant Account fee, the full amount will be deducted.
block_19: You still have time to avoid the Service Fee
block_20: If you wish to continue trading with us, simply place a deal on the platform to restore your account back to Active status. Your account will not be charged a service fee.
block_21: If you’re no longer interested in trading with IQ Option, you can make a withdrawal request, and it will be processed shortly. Once your account is emptied out, it shall be closed.
block_23: We appreciate your cooperation and understanding.
block_24: *As per the Company’s General Fees policy, 10 Euro is the full service fee to be charged dependent on availability of funds on the Client’s account.
